steps.title: Use Helmholtz's description
steps.content: The goal is to explain how Helmholtz describes F sharp major. The notes state that in On the Sensations of Tone, he describes its mood as brilliant, very clear.

steps.title: Reject incomplete details
steps.content: Choice A gives general background about keys. Choice B mentions that Helmholtz describes the mood but omits the actual description. Choice C applies the description to a song instead of to the key.

steps.title: Choose the direct quotation
steps.content: The sentence that includes Helmholtz's description of F sharp major as brilliant, very clear directly accomplishes the student's goal. The answer is D.
